# TamgamCAD

Professional 2D CAD drafting and modeling solution for engineers and architects.

## Overview
TamgamCAD provides advanced technical drawing, modification, and Boolean-based drafting tools on a single platform. It offers a cross-platform experience with specialized versions for desktop and mobile users.

## Versions
- **Desktop (Free)**: Essential 2D drafting environment, SVG/PNG export, and command-line support.
- **Mobile (Pro)**: Advanced drafting, full Boolean operations (Union, Difference, etc.), DXF/PDF export, and isometric grid support.

## Key Features
- **Boolean Operations**: Advanced solid modeling logic (Union, Difference, Intersection, XOR).
- **Export Options**: PNG, SVG, PDF, and industry-standard DXF.
- **Precision Tools**: Ortho mode, Osnap (Endpoint, Midpoint, Center), and Tan-Tan-Radius.
- **Organization**: Unlimited layers (Pro), Global Block Library, and Property Tables.

## Important Links
- [Features](https://tamgamcad.com/features.html): Detailed comparison of Desktop and Pro features.
- [User Guide](https://tamgamcad.com/guide.html): Official documentation and technical tutorials.
- [License](https://tamgamcad.com/licence.html): EULA and Privacy Policy information.
- [Contact](https://tamgamcad.com/index-en.html#contact): Official support via EmailJS-integrated form.
